name: gdrive_upload
description: Upload a file from GoClaw workspace to Google Drive and return a shareable link. Use after office-agent creates a file in 04_OUTPUTS/.

drive_folder.description: Google Drive subfolder under 'Dẹo Enterprise OS/', e.g. Kế_Toán/Bang_Luong/2026-05

command: rclone copy "/app/workspace/{{.local_path}}" "gdrive:/Dẹo Enterprise OS/{{.drive_folder}}/" --config /app/workspace/rclone.conf 2>&1 && rclone link "gdrive:/Dẹo Enterprise OS/{{.drive_folder}}/$(basename '{{.local_path}}')" --config /app/workspace/rclone.conf
